hero.name: KONAN Amani Dieudonné
hero.roles: Full-Stack Senior Statistician | Data Scientist | ML & AI Architect | Data Engineer | Full-Stack Developer | Strategic Consultant
hero.description: Full-Stack Senior Statistician, Data Scientist, Machine Learning & AI Professional with 13+ years of experience across the United Nations system, international development finance, and global organizations. MIT-certified in Data Engineering and AI, with advanced degrees in Statistics & Econometrics. Expert in the full data-to-intelligence pipeline: from statistical modeling and data engineering to AI/ML systems, full-stack development, and strategic consulting.

home.who_i_am_text: With a Master's in Statistics & Econometrics from Université Toulouse I Capitole (France) and professional certificates from MIT, I bring 13+ years of expertise across 11 organizations in 6+ countries. My career spans the United Nations system (ITU, IOM, UNHCR, UNIDIR), the International Cocoa Organization, and the African Export-Import Bank — where I've built enterprise AI systems, led econometric analysis of global commodity markets, and designed data architectures at institutional scale. Today, I operate as a full-stack professional spanning the entire data-to-intelligence continuum: from rigorous statistical and econometric analysis, through data engineering and architecture, to machine learning, AI systems, and full-stack web application development. I am driven by a conviction that data and intelligence are the most powerful levers for economic transformation and institutional excellence.
home.summary_text: A uniquely versatile full-stack professional combining deep expertise across the entire data value chain — from statistics and econometrics, through data engineering and science, to machine learning, AI systems, and full-stack application development. With over 13 years across 11 international organizations spanning the UN system, the International Cocoa Organization, development finance, and the private sector, I bridge the gap between rigorous quantitative analysis and production-grade technology solutions. From building enterprise AI systems, data architectures, and full-stack web platforms at Afreximbank to leading econometric analysis of global cocoa markets at ICCO, I bring a rare blend of statistical rigor, engineering depth, and strategic vision to every engagement.
home.expertise_stats_desc: Statistical inference, econometric modeling (ARIMA, VAR, VECM), causal analysis, survey design, impact evaluation, and time series forecasting for policy and research.
home.expertise_ds_desc: Advanced analytics, predictive modeling, feature engineering, and data-driven decision support for complex organizational challenges across finance, trade, and development.
home.expertise_ai_desc: End-to-end ML pipelines, deep learning, LLMs, RAG systems, NLP, AI agents, multi-model platforms, and production-grade AI system deployment with MLOps.
home.expertise_de_desc: Lakehouse architectures (Databricks/Delta Lake), ETL/ELT pipelines, CDC streaming, data governance (DAMA-DMBOK), and enterprise data platform design on AWS and cloud.
home.expertise_fullstack_desc: Modern web applications with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Python Flask, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM, REST APIs, authentication, and cloud deployment.
home.expertise_strategy_desc: Data strategy roadmaps, AI adoption advisory, digital transformation, organizational capacity building, and executive-level data-driven decision support.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Full-Stack Senior Statistician | Data Scientist | ML & AI Professional
about.bio: With over 13 years of experience across 11 international organizations in 6+ countries, I bring full-stack expertise spanning the entire data-to-intelligence pipeline — from statistical and econometric analysis, through data engineering and architecture, to machine learning, AI systems, and full-stack web application development. Trained as a Statistics & Information Systems Engineer at ENSEA Abidjan and holding a Master's in Statistics & Econometrics from Université Toulouse I Capitole, I have further sharpened my skills through professional certificates from MIT in Data Engineering, AI & Data Science, and a MicroMasters in Data, Economics & Development Policy. My career spans the United Nations system (ITU, IOM, UNHCR, UNIDIR), the International Cocoa Organization (ICCO), the African Export-Import Bank (Afreximbank), Barry-Callebaut, FHI360, ICRAF, and PAC-CI. I specialize in designing enterprise data architectures, building full-stack applications, deploying production-grade AI/ML systems, conducting rigorous econometric analysis, and driving data strategy for complex international organizations.

services.subtitle: Expert consulting and training services tailored to your needs
services.consulting_desc: Strategic advisory on AI adoption, data strategy, and digital transformation for enterprises and international organizations.
services.architecture_desc: Design and implementation of modern data platforms, lakehouse architectures, and enterprise data management solutions.
services.mlops_desc: End-to-end ML pipeline development, model deployment, monitoring, and optimization at scale.
services.training_desc: Customized training programs in data science, machine learning, and AI for teams and organizations.
services.statistics_desc: Rigorous statistical analysis, econometric modeling, survey design, causal inference, and impact evaluation for research and policy.
services.fullstack_desc: Custom web applications, dashboards, and platforms built with modern technologies — Next.js, React, TypeScript, Python, PostgreSQL, and cloud deployment.
